timeline.title: Early Life
timeline.story: Born in Porbandar, Gandhi’s early life shaped his moral foundation and simplicity.

timeline.title: London Education
timeline.story: Studied law in London, where he was first exposed to global ideas of justice.

timeline.title: South Africa Struggle
timeline.story: Faced racial discrimination, leading to the development of Satyagraha philosophy.

timeline.title: Non-Cooperation Movement
timeline.story: Mobilized millions in a peaceful resistance against British rule.

timeline.title: Salt March
timeline.story: A 240-mile march that became a global symbol of nonviolent resistance.

timeline.title: Self Reliance
timeline.story: Promoted self-sufficiency through spinning wheel and local production.

timeline.title: Independence
timeline.story: India achieved independence through a long struggle of non-violence.

timeline.title: Legacy
timeline.story: His philosophy continues to inspire global movements for peace.
